prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built S20 (2.0L inline-6, DOHC, 24-valve) with forged internals (JE 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a TODA Racing Stage 4 camshaft kit (280° duration, 11.5mm lift) and a Tomei 4-1 equal-length exhaust manifold for optimized scavenging.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, HKS SSQV blow-off valve, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller set to 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) for a target of 450 hp at the wheels on 98 RON fuel.

Drivetrain reinforcement with an OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the R200 differential, a Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (with a 4.375 final drive), and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel for aggressive launches.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works KPGC110-specific kit (hand-laid carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 3-inch extended wheelbase for aggressive stance and fitment of Work Meister S1 3P 15x11 wheels (ET +10) wrapped in 275/50R15 Yokohama Advan A052 tires.

Full custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), a Nismo GT-R KPGC110 commemorative steering wheel (MOMO Prototipo replica), and a full roll cage (Custom Cages T45 steel, 8-point) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360).

Aerodynamic package featuring a custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-scanned for KPGC110 chassis) with integrated canards (Rocket Bunny-style), a Voltex Type-3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm width, adjustable angle), and a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust outlets for the Tomei manifold.
